mapper.select: SELECT a.*, TO_CHAR(a.FROM_TIME, 'HH24:MI') as FROM_TIME_STR, TO_CHAR(a.TO_TIME, 'HH24:MI') as TO_TIME_STR, gvi.CONTENT as ITEM_NAME FROM AR_SHIFT020 a LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON a.ITEM_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' WHERE a.SHIFT_NO = #{shiftNo} ORDER BY a.ORDERNO, a.PK_NO
